stats.fact: AI in legal market projected to grow from $4.59 billion in 2025 to $5.59 billion in 2026 at CAGR of 22.3%
stats.source: Research and Markets AI in Legal Market Report 2026, researchandmarkets.com/reports/6225963/ai-in-legal-market-report

stats.fact: Legal Tech AI Market size was USD 26.28 billion in 2025, projected to reach USD 35.11 billion in 2026 and USD 46.92 billion in 2027
stats.source: Global Growth Insights Legal Tech AI Market, globalgrowthinsights.com/market-reports/legal-tech-artificial-intelligence-market-123086

stats.fact: 92% of legal professionals now utilize at least one AI tool in their daily work
stats.source: Wolters Kluwer Legal AI Adoption Report, wolterskluwer.com/en/expert-insights/legal-ai-adoption-time-savings-revenue-growth

stats.fact: In-house legal teams typically cut contract review time by 50-80% using AI tools
62% of legal professionals experienced time savings of 6-20% per week from AI tools; 52% reported revenue increases at the same rate
stats.source: Wolters Kluwer Legal AI Adoption Report, wolterskluwer.com/en/expert-insights/legal-ai-adoption-time-savings-revenue-growth

stats.fact: A midsize litigation group cut contract review time by 60% using an AI assistant that summarizes terms, flags missing clauses, and compares to preferred language
stats.source: Wolters Kluwer Legal AI Adoption Report, wolterskluwer.com/en/expert-insights/legal-ai-adoption-time-savings-revenue-growth

stats.fact: Global Legal AI Software Market projected to grow from USD 654.95 million in 2025 to USD 837.16 million in 2026
stats.source: Global Growth Insights Legal AI Software Market, globalgrowthinsights.com/market-reports/legal-ai-software-market-123942

stats.fact: Legal Tech AI market growing at 33.63% CAGR through 2035, driven by contract automation and compliance AI
stats.source: Global Growth Insights Legal Tech AI Market, globalgrowthinsights.com/market-reports/legal-tech-artificial-intelligence-market-123086
